goals.name: Lose Weight
goals.description: Reduce body fat and achieve a healthy weight through caloric deficit.

goals.name: Gain Muscle
goals.description: Increase lean muscle mass through caloric surplus and strength training.

goals.name: Maintain Health
goals.description: Keep a balanced diet to sustain current fitness and well-being.

goals.name: Improve Energy
goals.description: Optimize nutrition for better daily energy levels and mental clarity.

goals.name: Medical Diet
goals.description: Follow a diet plan tailored to specific medical conditions.

activity-levels.name: Sedentary
activity-levels.description: Little or no exercise, desk job.

activity-levels.name: Extra Active
activity-levels.description: Very hard exercise, physical job or training twice a day.

allergies.name: Gluten
allergies.description: Intolerance or allergy to gluten found in wheat, barley, and rye.

allergies.name: Lactose
allergies.description: Intolerance to lactose found in dairy products.

allergies.name: Nuts
allergies.description: Allergy to tree nuts such as almonds, walnuts, and cashews.

allergies.name: Eggs
allergies.description: Allergy to chicken eggs and egg-derived products.
